missions.name: Iron pull — sector 88-Mars
missions.briefing: Belt Mining Corp. Target asteroid logged for mineral extraction, iron-class yield. Standard contract rates. Fill your hold, return to any registered station. Contract ID on file.

missions.name: Nickel haul — outer belt
missions.briefing: Belt Mining Corp. Long-range extraction, nickel-class ore. Rock is deep but the yield justifies the burn. Fuel budget accordingly. Full hold required for bonus tier.
